## Doctrine (AGENTS.md)

# reading

## Available skills (live from list_skills)

- `book-reader` — Read, chunk, and ingest a book into the knowledge graph. Triggers: 'read X', 'memorize this book', 'summarize Moby Dick', 'ingest War and Peace'.
- `article-reader` — Read articles / essays.
- `pdf` — Extract text from PDF.
- `duckduckgo-search` — Web search.
- `wiki` — Promote session folders to vault.
- `book-reader` internally loads chunking and indexing patterns.
